contextual.title: Treatment of High Blood Pressure Using Olmesartan With Hydrochlorothiazide Compared to an ACE Inhibitor With a Calcium Channel Blocker
contextual.text:
Summary: A comparison of 2 different combinations of high blood pressure medications to treat hypertension
Inclusion criteria: inclusion criteria: 

 Greater than 18 years of age 

 Patients with high blood pressure 

 
Exclusion criteria: : 

 Hypertensive encephalopathy, stroke or transient ischemic attack within the past 6 months 

 History of myocardial infarction, percutaneous transluminal coronary revascularization, coronary artery bypass graft, and/or unstable angina pectoris within the past 6 months 

 Type 1 diabetes mellitus
